heading: Definitions
label: 11851 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in introductory provisions, means title III of , , , which enacted this chapter and sections 3156–1, 3201, and 3227 of Title 20, Education, and amended sections 1786, 4994, and 5081 of this title and sections 3156a, 3181, 3191 to 3195, 3197, 3212, and 3222 of Title 20. For complete classification of title III to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 100–690102 Stat. 4244Nov. 18, 1988Subtitle A (other than section 3201), referred to in par. (9)(A), is subtitle A (§§ 3101–3402) of title III of , , , which enacted former sections 3156–1, 3201, and 3227 of Title 20, and amended sections 4994 and 5081 of this title and former sections 3156a, 3181, 3191 to 3195, 3197, 3212, and 3222 of Title 20. For complete classification of subtitle A to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 100–690102 Stat. 4245Nov. 18, 1988Section 3201, referred to in par. (9)(A), (B), is , title III, , , which amended .section 3201 of Pub. L. 100–690102 Stat. 4246section 1786 of this titleNov. 18, 1988Subtitle B, referred to in par. (9)(C), is subtitle B (§§ 3501–3522) of title III of , , , which enacted subchapters I to III of this chapter. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 100–690102 Stat. 4254Nov. 18, 1988, referred to in par. (12), was subsequently amended, and no longer defines “unit of general local government”. However, it now defines “unit of local government”.Section 11103(8) of title 34

Amendments1998—Par. (7). substituted “section 1001” for “section 1141(a)”.Pub. L. 105–2441993—Par. (5). added par. (5) and struck out former par. (5) which read as follows: “the term ‘Director’ means the Director of the ACTION Agency,”.Pub. L. 103–821989— redesignated pars. (2) to (13) as (1) to (12), respectively, and struck out former par. (1) which read as follows: “the term ‘Administrator’ means the Administrator of the Office of Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention,”.Pub. L. 101–204

Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under , Education.Pub. L. 105–244Pub. L. 105–244section 3 of Pub. L. 105–244section 1001 of Title 20Oct. 1, 1998

children.text: the term “community based” has the meaning given it in ,section 11103(1) of title 34
the term “controlled substance” has the meaning given it in ,section 802(6) of title 21
the term “controlled substance analogue” has the meaning given it in ,section 802(32) of title 21
the term “Director” means the Chief Executive Officer of the Corporation for National and Community Service,
the term “illicit” means unlawful or injurious,
the term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given it in ,section 1001 of title 20
the term “public agency” has the meaning given it in ,section 11103(11) of title 34

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary of Education for purposes of subtitle A (other than section 3201),

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary of Agriculture for purposes of the amendments made by section 3201, and

children.label: C
children.text: the Secretary of Health and Human Services for purposes of subtitle B,
the term “State” has the meaning given it in ,section 11103(7) of title 34
the term “treatment” has the meaning given it in , andsection 11103(15) of title 34
the term “unit of general local government” has the meaning given it in section 11103(8) of title 34.1
